riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)
new capability: new exported class / subsystem added
new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: Not a regression. The /telegram/reply chokepoint always had only an id-based dedup (catches re-POST of the same delivery id) and an LLM tone gate (skipped for proxy/relay) — never a deterministic CONTENT dedup. The gap was latent from the relay's introduction; it surfaced as agents began re-announcing status after restarts/recoveries and cross-machine relay re-emitted identical content under fresh ids (2026-06-06 EXO logs: byte-identical send 13.5 min apart). Adjacent to the restart/recovery churn from the same day's compaction work.
